description_long: This dumbbell features a solid, cylindrical handle with a slightly concave midsection, connecting two large, rounded end caps. The surface is predominantly dark gray to black, with visible patches of lighter wear and scuff marks, suggesting frequent use. The end caps are circular and slightly domed, with one end displaying a faint, scratched 'X' mark. The material appears to be dense stone or cast iron, giving the object a heavy and robust appearance. There are no visible brand logos or weight markings on any surface. The overall condition is worn, with clear evidence of surface abrasions and discoloration.
description: A heavy, dark gray dumbbell with rounded, worn end caps and a concave handle, showing visible scuffs and surface wear.
description_view_0: The view shows one rounded end cap with a scratched 'X' mark and visible surface wear.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the concave handle and both rounded end caps, with clear signs of abrasion and discoloration.
description_view_2: The opposite end cap is visible, more uniformly worn and lacking distinct markings.
description_view_3: Another side view of the handle and end caps, showing a slightly different wear pattern and surface texture.
attribute_handle_type: Cylindrical, concave, round cross-section, rough stone texture, no ergonomic features.
attribute_end_cap_design: Rounded, circular, slightly domed stone end caps with visible surface abrasions and a scratched 'X' on one end.
attribute_condition: Worn, with visible scuffs, abrasions, and discoloration; no major damage.
